system.notes:
Type: Healing Drug · Strength (drug power rating, design system pg.124): +2 · Difficulty (to synthesize): 33 · Cost: 1650eb · Duration: 1D6+1 hours.

Speedheal is designed to enhance the natural healing processes. Side effects are reduced REF by 1D6/3 for a period of 1 week after use.

Printed healing mechanic (“Speed Healing Drugs”, Trauma Team chapter): “Drugs can be used to speed the healing rate by 1 additional point per day. Expensive and often proscribed, these drugs have a neural side effect of reducing the patient's REF stat by 1D6/3 for a week after use. Speedheal costs 1650eb per treatment.”

Wiring note (Cyberpunk 2020 2nd ed. pg.122–123): the Effects Table (pg.124, “Increase healing rate 1 point per point of Strength”, Strength 2) would read +2, but the drug's own printed description gives the concrete mechanic — +1 additional healing point per day — and wins. Healing rate has no slot in the drug schema: NOT auto-applied; adjudicate per the healing rules. The wear-off penalty (REF −1D6/3 for 1 week) is a random, automatic amount and stays prose. NB: the entry cites the description at “pg. 107” but in our copy it falls on book p.117 — page cite left for user eyes. Manufacturer: not printed.

mechDrug.note: Healing drug: +1 healing point per day (printed description; not auto-applied — see notes).
